name: Poultry Pockets
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound cooked turkey or chicken breast, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except the pitas and sprouts.
2. Refrigerate the mixture for 30 minutes or longer to allow flavors to meld.
3. Cut each pita in half crosswise to form four pockets.
4. Fill the pockets with the salad mixture.
5. If desired, top each pocket with alfalfa sprouts.
